# AddMediaIntentHandlingInvocationResponse

**Type**

The service’s response to a request to process an add media intent.

## Declaration

```swift
* AddMediaIntentHandlingInvocationResponse
```

## Discussion

Allowed types: [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/AddMediaIntentHandlingResolveMediaItemsInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/AddMediaIntentHandlingResolveMediaDestinationInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/AddMediaIntentHandlingConfirmInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/AddMediaIntentHandlingHandleInvocationResponse].

## Processing an Add Media Intent

- **AddMediaIntent**: An object that describes the user’s request to add media items to their library or to a specific playlist.
- **AddMediaIntentHandlingInvocation**: A request to process an add media intent.
